rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex delimiters
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers in repairs
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in repairs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not add guarantees that reference invalid identifiers
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics about named thing types
AGREE validator diagnostics about scalar type names
AGREE validator diagnostics about implementation scope guarantees
